The '''SSIC-S4.2''' was a cybernetic internal [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. Cyborg users had it implanted in their skulls.

==Notable users==
*[[Lotas]]
